name: Popcorn Snacks
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces lightly salted dry roasted nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan over medium heat, cook and stir butter and marshmallows in oil until the marshmallows are melted. Stir in vanilla and salt.
2. In a very large bowl, combine popcorn, M&Ms, and peanuts. Pour marshmallow mixture over popcorn; mix well.
3. Press into two greased 13x9x2 inches pans or two 12 cup molds.
4. Allow to set for at least 2 hours. Remove from pans or molds and slice.
5. Store in an airtight container. Yield: 3 to 3-1/2 dozen.
